headline: How I can help you
intro: Every service is built around one principle: getting to the root of your symptoms and building a plan that works for your unique body.

services_list.name: Root-Cause Consultation
services_list.description: Your journey begins with a comprehensive 90-minute consultation — the most in-depth health conversation you'll ever have. We review your full health history, symptoms timeline, family history, lifestyle, stress patterns, diet and more.
services_list.detail: This isn't a 10-minute GP appointment. This is the time and space to truly understand you.

services_list.name: Hormone & Gut Health
services_list.description: Hormonal imbalances and gut dysfunction are at the root of a vast range of symptoms — from fatigue and weight gain to anxiety, skin conditions and autoimmune issues.
services_list.detail: Using advanced functional testing (DUTCH hormone panels, comprehensive stool analysis, SIBO breath testing and more), Dr Najat creates targeted protocols to restore balance from within.

services_list.name: Personalised Wellness Programme
services_list.description: For patients who are ready to commit to a comprehensive transformation, the 3 or 6-month wellness programme provides everything you need to achieve sustainable, lasting results.
services_list.detail: You'll receive full access to Dr Najat throughout your programme — with regular consultations, messaging support, and a continuously refined protocol as your body responds and heals.
